entries.title: Lovable reportedly in talks to double its valuation to $13.2B
entries.description: The $300 million round is expected to be led by Menlo Ventures, Sifted reported.

entries.title: Google’s deepfake detector system used to debunk McConnell hoax pic
entries.description: Earlier this week, a picture seemed to show Kentucky Senator Mitch McConnell covered in tubes in a hospital bed in a state of extreme distress. It turned out to be an AI-generated fake.

entries.title: OpenAI launches its new family of models with GPT-5.6
entries.description: OpenAI's latest family of models promise improvements across a range of areas, including cybersecurity.

entries.title: An AI agent startup just let its agent run its $100M fundraise
entries.description: Lyzr, a startup that builds AI agents for enterprises, used its own AI agent to raise a $100 million round — proof, evidently, that the product actually works.

entries.title: OpenAI is shutting down Atlas, but its AI browser ambitions are still growing
entries.description: OpenAI is sunsetting its AI-powered browser after less than a year. But it's moving some agentic browsing features to its desktop app and a Chrome extension.

entries.title: Elon Musk praises Mythos/Fable, promises not to ‘cut off’ Anthropic
entries.description: Should Anthropic trust Elon Musk to host its models? With about $40 billion in revenue at stake, Musk insists that the company can.

entries.title: Can AI answer the $3 trillion question?
entries.description: The AI ROI debate has returned and the numbers are even bigger, as are, perhaps, the consequences.

entries.title: Meta enters the crowded AI coding battle with Muse Spark 1.1
entries.description: Meta's pitch to users is Spark's ability to handle large agentic workloads, fix bugs, and help with large code migrations — the kind of automation that enterprises are increasingly turning to AI compa

entries.title: New York Times says OpenAI hid evidence in ChatGPT copyright trial
entries.description: News publishers say OpenAI hid tools and datasets that could identify copyrighted journalism in ChatGPT outputs, escalating their lawsuit with a new motion for sanctions.

entries.title: Google will now disclose which ads are made with AI
entries.description: While Google prohibits misleading and deceptive ads, an ad can still leverage AI to create some type of synthetic or digitally altered content. Until now, that's something Google only required electio

entries.title: Paris-based AI voice startup Gradium raises $100M seed, backed by Nvidia
entries.description: The company is using the cash to open an office in the Bay Area and compete for talent there, "strengthening its position at the heart of the world's leading AI ecosystem."

entries.title: How did the government decide OpenAI’s frontier model was safe to release?
entries.description: "Exactly what that dialog looked like between the government and Anthropic and OpenAI is unclear."

entries.title: Instagram users: Here’s how to stop Meta’s AI from using your photos
entries.description: Muse Image allows users to generate AI images using photos from public Instagram accounts. As long as a person's profile is public, another user can tag that account and use their images as part of an

entries.title: Meta’s new AI chips will begin production in September
entries.description: The company is taking a modular approach to designing these chips, anticipating that their needs will change as AI evolves rapidly by the time the chips are in production.

entries.title: Nvidia is a victim of the compute marketplace it created
entries.description: Having proven how valuable compute can be, the company finds itself at the center of a market everyone wants to be in — while simpler technologies and less interesting companies get rich on the sideli

entries.title: Anthropic’s new Claude feature is quietly selling you on AI
entries.description: Claude’s new Reflect dashboard doesn’t just visualize how you use AI. It also subtly reinforces how much of your daily work now depends on Anthropic’s chatbot.

entries.title: Anthropic, OpenAI, and SpaceX are bigger than the last 25 years of tech exits
entries.description: Three big AI IPOs are set to generate more value than all the U.S. VC-backed exits since 2000.

entries.title: Popular open source AI developer tool Ollama raises $65M, grows to nearly 9M users
entries.description: Benchmark-backed Ollama has amassed 176,000 stars, and nearly 17,000 forks on GitHub by helping developers easily run AI on their PCs.

entries.title: Character.AI enters the microdrama arena with its own productions, but there’s a twist
entries.description: In an interesting twist that takes advantage of the company's core product, users can chat with these shows' characters, ask them questions, and even roleplay different storylines.

entries.title: Nandan Nilekani leaves GP role at Fundamentum as it launches $200M third fund
entries.description: Nilekani remains Fundamentum's anchor investor as the firm expands its leadership team and targets AI and fintech startups in India.
